Discover potential causes for one target time series (TCDF)

Source: R/temporalCausaDiscovery.R
TCDF_find_causes.Rd

R equivalent of TCDF.findcauses. Trains ADDSTCN with attention, interprets attention for candidate parents, applies the permutation (PIVM) check, and estimates delays from depthwise kernel weights.

Usage

TCDF_find_causes(
  target,
  cuda,
  epochs,
  kernel_size,
  layers,
  log_interval,
  lr,
  optimizername,
  seed,
  dilation_c,
  significance,
  file
)

Arguments

target

Name of the target column in file.

cuda

Logical; use CUDA if available.

epochs

Integer, training epochs.

kernel_size

Convolution kernel size.

layers

Number of temporal blocks in the depthwise net.

log_interval

Print every this many epochs.

lr

Learning rate.

optimizername

Optimizer class name: "Adam", "AdamW", "RMSprop", or "SGD" (Python torch.optim names).

seed

Integer random seed.

dilation_c

Dilation base per level.

significance

Multiplier for the PIVM loss-difference threshold.

file

Path to CSV (rows = time, columns = series).

Value

A list with validated (1-based cause column indices), causeswithdelay (data.frame with cause, delay), realloss, and scores (attention weights per channel).

References

Nauta et al., TCDF: Temporal Causal Discovery Framework.
